body.docName: 采购付款预入库单推送结果回写
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/push-result-update 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/push-result-update 
 ## 接口描述 
预入库单推送结果回写接口，将每条预入库单的推送结果回写至采购付款。
注意：
单次回写上限为300条；
本接口对应图中红框里的流程。


![推送预入库单.png](https://s3gw.cmbchina.com/lw36.01-public-prd/public-a1dfd494-ade9-4302-b440-7f88e07b517b)

 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"pushResultList","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","maxLength":"300","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81300%E4%B8%AA%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E5%88%99%E4%B8%8D%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"inventoryCode","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"100","exampleValue":"%22INV1234567%22","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"result","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%9D%A1%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"msg","label":"%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95PRE000001%E4%B8%8D%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%22","maxLength":"200","desc":"%20%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}}],"open":false}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%AE%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9D%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9C%E3%80%82%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%22%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D"},"open":false}],"open":false}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "pushResultList": [
        {
            "inventoryCode": "20250829-2",
            "result": true,
            "msg": "His0002"
        },
        {
            "inventoryCode": "20250829-3",
            "result": false,
            "msg": "连接异常"
        }
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": "推送结果更新成功",
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员|
  | E0002| 更新预入库单数量不得超过300条| 请确保单次更新的预入库单号数量少于300条

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/push-result-update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/push-result-update

接口描述

预入库单推送结果回写接口，将每条预入库单的推送结果回写至采购付款。
注意：
单次回写上限为300条；
本接口对应图中红框里的流程。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"pushResultList","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","maxLength":"300","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81300%E4%B8%AA%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E5%88%99%E4%B8%8D%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"inventoryCode","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"100","exampleValue":"%22INV1234567%22","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"result","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%9D%A1%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"msg","label":"%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95PRE000001%E4%B8%8D%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%22","maxLength":"200","desc":"%20%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9B%0A%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%9A%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}}],"open":false}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%AE%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9D%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9C%E3%80%82%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"%22%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E2%80%9C%E6%8E%A8%E9%80%81%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9D"},"open":false}],"open":false}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {    

  2.     "pushResultList": [  

  3.         {  

  4.             "inventoryCode":"20250829-2",  

  5.             "result":true,  

  6.             "msg":"His0002"  

  7.         },  

  8.                 {  

  9.             "inventoryCode":"20250829-3",  

  10.             "result":false,  

  11.             "msg":"连接异常"  

  12.         }  

  13.     ]  

  14. }

响应报文

  1. {  

  2.     "body": "推送结果更新成功",  

  3.     "returnCode": "SUC0000",  

  4.     "success": true,  

  5.     "message": "成功"  

  6. }

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
EROOR1系统错误稍后再试，或联系开发人员
E0002更新预入库单shu'l不得超过300条请确保单次更新的预入库单号数量少于300条
